nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: 安地斯山脈
nodes.summary: 安地斯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联156种鸟类，包括北山䳍、达尔文拟䳍、高山斑䳍等156种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bolivian brushfinch
nodes.summary: The Bolivian brushfinch or rufous-naped brushfinch (Atlapetes rufinucha) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is endemic to Bolivia and is found in humid Andean forests. It sometimes includes the rufous-naped brushfinch, Vilcabamba brushfinch and grey-eared brushfinches as subspecies. References
